Admonition: A callout block used to highlight important information. Types include note, tip, info, caution, and danger.
Design Token: A platform-agnostic variable that stores a design decision (color, spacing, typography) as a key-value pair in JSON format.
FAQ Index Plugin: A custom Docusaurus plugin that automatically indexes FAQ pages by scanning for ### headings and generating a searchable table of contents.
Frontmatter: YAML metadata at the top of a markdown file (between --- delimiters) that defines properties like title, description, and keywords.
Lightbox: An image viewer overlay that appears when clicking on images, allowing zoom and pan interactions.
MDX: A file format that combines Markdown with JSX, allowing you to use React components directly in documentation content.
Mermaid: A JavaScript-based diagramming tool that renders diagrams from text definitions in markdown code blocks.

Sidebar.Category: A collapsible group of sidebar items that organizes related documentation pages.
Sidebar.Autogenerated: A sidebar configuration that automatically creates entries from the filesystem structure of the docs directory.

Smart Search Plugin: A build-time plugin that indexes all documentation pages and provides fast client-side full-text search using Fuse.js.
